sectionDesc: Global campaign management and strategic communication that became the foundation for explaining complex digital infrastructure to government ministries, rural SHGs, and network participants.

roles.title: Lenovo Worldwide
roles.description: Group Account Manager handling Western Europe, APAC, Latin America. Led Think Range go-to-market for Large Enterprise, SMB, Government, and Education sectors. Pioneered shift from tactical messaging to evidence-based content strategy for the education sector. Launched first Lenovo tablet and first Intel-based smartphone in Western Europe.

roles.title: Luxury Retail, Government & Real Estate
roles.description: Account lead for Rivoli Group, Swatch Group (Cartier, Omega, Rado, Tissot), Landmark Group, Dubai Media Office (Govt. of UAE), Deyaar Properties, and Commercial Bank Qatar. Managed ATL/BTL/digital campaigns including international photo-shoots and product launches.
